subcodes.title: Words to the wife of Counsel Schwartz, spoken on 1913-04-04
subcodes.first_line: You must let the children study that which they like best. If your daughter loves art, she can devote her time to it and surely she will succeed.
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @humor; jokes, @creativity in art, @education of children; moral education
